club.joinBody: Once the club owner approves your request you can start booking sessions.

join.pending: Your request to join is pending approval.
join.approved: You're a member of this club.
join.rejected: Your request to join was rejected.
join.banned: You can't book sessions at this club right now.

verify.subject: Oarly — Verify your email
verify.heading: Verify your email
verify.body: Please verify your email address to activate your Oarly account. Just click the link below.

reset.subject: Oarly — Reset your password
reset.heading: Reset your password
reset.body: We received a request to reset your password. Click the link below to set a new one.

auth.verifyBody: We sent you a verification link. Click the link in your email to continue.
auth.forgotBody: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
auth.resetDone: Your password is updated. You can sign in now.
auth.kvkkConsent: I have read and accept the privacy policy and KVKK clarification text.
auth.kvkkNotice: By continuing you accept the privacy policy and KVKK clarification text.
auth.errorPassword: Password must be at least 8 characters.
auth.errorConsent: You must accept the KVKK text to continue.
auth.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

privacy.title: Privacy & KVKK
privacy.stub: The full clarification text and privacy policy will be published before launch.

admin.title: Admin
admin.name: Name
admin.errorOwnerNotFound: No user with that email. The account must be created first.
admin.errorNameInvalid: Club name must be at least 2 characters.

requestClub.title: Club request
requestClub.body: Request to bring your club onto Oarly. Once an admin approves it, the club goes live.
requestClub.name: Club name
requestClub.submittedBody: Your club will be activated after admin review.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.body: The page you're looking for doesn't exist.

unavailable.title: This club is currently unavailable
unavailable.body: This club isn't active yet. Please check back later.

manage.title: Club management
manage.setupIntro: Complete these to open bookings later.

skillLevels.title: Skill levels
skillLevels.intro: Define your club's ordered levels. Members are assigned a level; boats can require a minimum level.
skillLevels.deleteConfirm: Delete this level? {members} member(s) and {boats} boat(s) reference it and will be reset to no level.

boats.title: Boats
boats.intro: Define your boat types. Seats set the session capacity; eligibility limits who can book.
boats.name: Name
boats.needSkillLevels: Tip: add skill levels first if you want to require a minimum level.

profile.title: Public profile
profile.intro: This is what visitors see on your club page.
profile.name: Club name
profile.logoError: Upload failed. Use a PNG/JPG/WebP/SVG under 2 MB.
